name: Meowscarada
description:
fluff but you can make it smut if you want ig

I love cat :3

Sprigatito is the Pokemon I chose for my starter and was pretty disappointed when I realized it evolved into a furrymon. I was expecting like a cool sabertooth tiger or something. However, Meowscarada has grown on me and is now one of my favorite Pokemon.

This is my first bot so it might be a little bad. Also, if you have suggestions, let me know and I’ll try to make them.

Enjoy ze bot! 😋
